title: MCP call_tool must inspect isError flag in tool result
description: CC callMCPTool (client.ts:3124-3148) checks result.isError === true and throws McpToolCallError with the text from result.content[0].text (or legacy result.error). OC McpServer::call_tool (src/mcp.rs:487-502) returns the raw Value without inspecting isError. Callers receive a payload that describes a tool-level error as a success value, which will be silently passed to the LLM as if the call succeeded. Required: after tools/call response, check for isError:true and return McpError::ServerError (new variant) with extracted message.
